title: tricalysia viridiflora
intro: Tricalysia viridiflora is a species of plant in the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the green-flowered Tricalysia. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tricalysia viridiflora include its potential to treat fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat wounds. Tricalysia viridiflora is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the leaves and stems used to make herbal teas or tinctures.
